description: Stepan Simkin, co-founder and CEO of Squad Labs, discusses the advancements in the Squad ecosystem, including the development of Squad's Protocol V5, which aims to enhance the on-chain economy by improving smart account functionalities and introducing FusePay, a virtual prepaid card for stablecoin transactions.
topic_summary: In this keynote, Stepan Simkin outlines key developments in Squad's ecosystem, including the upcoming Squad's Protocol V5 with enhanced features for developers and the launch of FusePay, a prepaid card for stablecoin spending, aimed at bridging on-chain and off-chain payments [t=3:6].
